title: Build Track 1 persona visual touches on index.html
description: 8 items totaling ~14-16 hrs: hero tagline swap, about section copy swap, competencies grid reorder, work card order, persona accent color thread through CSS custom properties, Fenix greeting tooltip, contact CTA subtext, viewing-as indicator. All pure frontend JS/CSS, zero backend dependencies. See PERSONA-PICKER.md Section 10 for full spec.
